summary: Mediocre performance hampered by poor dome acoustics, yielding a modest listening experience.
review: The reviewer found the concert only okay, noting that the HHH dome's acoustics were so bad they could barely recognize the songs. Moving around improved the sound slightly, but overall the recording suffers from muffled and unclear audio, keeping the show from being great.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; both performance and recording are described as average to below average.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Poor dome acoustics cause muffled, unclear sound; some improvement when moving position but overall lacking clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer felt the show was okay but not great.
